scope.target: Rewrite TEAM-GIT-FLOW-RULES to the current single-mainline branch model.
constraints: Use main as the only long-lived trunk.
Feature or workflow branches branch from main and merge back with no-ff.
non_goals: Do not redefine commit title/body policy.

user_constraints: The current process is a single main trunk and no complex branch routes.

validation: Run rg for outdated branch model terms.

results.summary: Rewrote TEAM-GIT-FLOW-RULES to the current single-mainline model: main is the only long-lived trunk, short-lived branches merge back with no-ff, and commit/workflow details link to canonical standards.
tests_run: rg outdated branch model terms in .dev/TEAM-GIT-FLOW-RULES.MD
